title: helmod
description: The project here is a project made using Player.Games. It adds the ability for a MySQL style database with the ability to pull and receive from the database the following stats. "Shiny rates" "Catch Rates with all pokeballs." and "Experience Rates"
body:
Requires a MYSQL database to run.
Utilizes commands such as /helmod catch (target) (multiplier) , /helmod shiny (target) (multiplier) , /helmod exp (target) (multiplier).
Helmod works with 1.6.1 Cobblemon for the EXP rate multipliers as well as the Catch rate multipliers.
However it is also prepared for Shiny Rates to be adjusted moving forward into the future updates of cobblemon.
We are not affiliated with the cobblemon mod in anyway shape or size. This is a mod that was made using the website Player.Games.
